name: caskt
description: Caskt — a local, open-source CS2 inventory and storage-unit manager. Manage. Track. Collect.
author: 0xRetroDev (https://0xretro.dev)

scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix ui install && npm --prefix desktop install
scripts.build:renderer: npm run build:server && npm run build:ui
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm --prefix desktop run dist
scripts.build:dir: npm run build:renderer && npm --prefix desktop run dist:dir
scripts.dev: npm run build:renderer && npm --prefix desktop run dev
